evidence.snippet: Custom Sensors & Electronics for Harsh Environments – Level | Position | Temperature | Speed | Flow

Liquid Level Sensors
--------------------
Solid-state capacitive liquid level sensors for fuel, oil, coolant and water.

items.notes: Liquid level (fuel/oil/coolant/water), position (TMR rotary/linear), temperature, pressure and speed sensors sold into UAV, defence, motorsport and industrial markets. Closest available category given no 'vehicle health monitoring' bucket.

products_categories.notes: All sensor families (level, position, temperature, pressure, speed) target vehicle/platform health monitoring. UAV is an explicit industry vertical with dedicated products.

value.address: Reventec Ltd, Downton Business Centre, Downton, Salisbury, Wiltshire SP5 3HU

evidence.snippet: Reventec Ltd Downton Business Centre, Downton, Salisbury, Wiltshire SP5 3HU

Reventec is a UK-based custom sensor design and development consultancy. We harness the latest technologies in our non-contact position, capacitive liquid level and programmable temperature sensing solutions. Our products are designed for high reliability in harsh environments and are used extensively throughout **[motorsport](https://www.reventec.com/industries-custom-sensors-harsh-environments/motorsport-design-and-engineering/)**, **[defence,](https://www.reventec.com/industries/defence-security/)** **[UAV](https://www.reventec.com/industries/unmanned-aerial-vehicles)**, **[industrial](https://www.reventec.com/industries/industrial/)**, **[automotive](https://www.reventec.com/industries/automotive/)**, **[rail](https://www.reventec.com/industries/rail/)**, **[off-highway](https://www.reventec.com/industries/off-highway-vehicles/)**, and **[marine](https://www.reventec.com/industries/marine/)** sectors.
Ultra-lightweight capacitive fuel level sensor with a small footprint, designed for mil-spec UAV platforms. Available in custom sizes up to 300mm.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures sensors (liquid level, position, temperature, pressure) installed as components inside UAV platforms. Explicitly supplies Alpha Unmanned Systems Alpha 900 and Shield AI V-BAT.

evidence.snippet:
LS100 Liquid Level Sensor
=========================
LS100 Liquid Level Sensor
=========================
Advanced capacitive liquid level sensor with a simple 1-bolt fixing, custom-built up to 450mm long.

Micro Mil-Spec Liquid Level Sensor
----------------------------------
Ultra-lightweight capacitive fuel level sensor with a small footprint, designed for mil-spec UAV platforms. Available in custom sizes up to 300mm.

items.name: LSM200-38999
items.product_type: MIL-DTL-38999 compatible capacitive liquid level sensor

evidence.snippet:
Quantum 360 (Single Output) TMR Rotary Position Sensor
======================================================
Quantum 360 (Single Output) TMR Rotary Position Sensor
======================================================
The 360º TMR Rotary Position Sensor is designed to provide industry-leading accuracy and reliability in harsh environment applications, with the ability to detect through large sections of non-ferrous material.
Quantum 360 (Dual Redundant) Rotary Non-Contact Position Sensor

Mil-Spec 0-400 Bar CAN Pressure Sensor
======================================
Mil-Spec 0-400 Bar CAN Pressure Sensor
======================================
A mil-spec CAN pressure sensor with built in transmitter designed to measure pressure across a 0-400 bar (0-6000 psi) pressure measurement. With stainless steel construction, high temperature tolerance and a MIL-DTL-38999 connector this pressure sensor is an ideal drop-in solution for military vehicles.

products.notes: Reventec has 28 liquid level sensor SKUs, 30 position sensor SKUs, 7 temperature sensors, plus speed and pressure sensors — only representative named products listed here.

ndaa.notes: UK-headquartered company; no NDAA Section 848/889 mention found anywhere in corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS reference found in any fetched page.

readiness.notes: Cataloged SKUs across 5 sensor families (28 liquid level, 30 position, 7 temperature, 1 pressure, 1 speed). UK-based manufacturing facility co-located with design office. Also offers bespoke custom sensor design alongside standard production lines.

tagline: Mil-spec capacitive fuel/oil level sensors and non-contact TMR position sensors for UAV and defence platforms, in production across micro to heavy-duty variants. UK-based. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of specific defence contracts or programs is thin.
